V-M-001.checks: Backend config and DB initialization remain runnable; auth and crypto helpers still load. Default secret_key is rejected with ValueError. DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY is required. Token blacklist functions work with Redis and degrade gracefully without it. All datetime values are timezone-aware.
V-M-001.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v

scenarios.scenario: App refuses to start with default secret_key
All datetime comparisons use timezone-aware values
Blacklisted token is rejected by verify_token_with_blacklist

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: Full backend/tests/test_security.py passed, 12 tests including Phase-25 blacklist additions.
